calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KIM EMBRY's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Kim Embry's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendants PBI-Gordon Corporation and Tractor Supply Company is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned Order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
